format.description:
Format is the stored artifact type when this chapter was ingested from an
archive ("cbz" | "epub" | "pdf" | ""). Empty means remote-only.

url.description:
URL identifies the entry in the Mihon source contract. Optional on write:
when omitted, the service defaults it to the generated media id.

chapterId.description: ChapterID is the catalog chapter these pages belong to (required).

text.description:
Text is the inline chapter text. When set, the server stores it as a `.txt`
object in R2 and uses that key. Ignored when TextKey is set.

textKey.description:
TextKey is the R2 object key of an already-uploaded `.txt` (alternative to
Text). One of Text or TextKey is required.

mediaTypes.description:
MediaTypes is the distinct set of media types this source currently
carries (subset of manga|video|novel), sorted alphabetically. Populated on
the listing paths so the reader can tell what a source offers without a
per-type probe; omitted (never null) when the source has no media.

files.description: Files are every part of the bundle (playlist(s), init, segments). Required.

prefix.description: Prefix is an optional target R2 key prefix; defaults to hls/{uuid}/.

chapterId.description: ChapterID is the catalog chapter these pages belong to (required).

playlistKey.description: PlaylistKey is the R2 object key of the HLS `.m3u8` playlist (required).

width.description: Width / Height are the video's pixel dimensions (optional, informational).

contentType.description: ContentType binds the required Content-Type of the PUT (default image/avif).
ContentType binds the required Content-Type of each PUT (default image/avif).

count.description: Count is how many page upload URLs to mint (1..5000).

email.description: optional; blank = any email may redeem

info.description: Manga catalog + reader API that mirrors the Mihon iOS SourceRuntime contract, plus CBZ/EPUB/PDF -> AVIF conversion backed by Cloudflare R2/D1. Write endpoints are protected by an embedded OpenID Provider; clients onboard via OAuth2 Dynamic Client Registration (RFC 7591/7592).
info.title: Mihon Manga Server

post.description: Dynamic Client Registration. Unauthenticated. Returns the new client_id plus a registration_access_token used to manage the client via RFC 7592. A client_secret is issued unless token_endpoint_auth_method is "none".
post.summary: Register an OAuth2 client (RFC 7591)
Create a house ad (admin)
Mint a presigned creative-upload URL (admin)

get.description: Admin-only page listing that exposes each page's raw r2Key alongside a short-lived presigned imageUrl, so an operator can inspect and delete individual artifacts. Requires admin.read.
get.summary: List a chapter's pages with raw R2 keys (admin).

delete.description: Removes one page (by index) from a chapter and schedules its R2 object for async cleanup. Requires admin.write.
delete.summary: Delete a single chapter page and its artifact (admin).

post.summary: Create a source (admin)
Create a sub-type (admin)

get.description: Active house-ad creatives the reader interleaves between pages. Each imageUrl is a short-lived presigned R2 URL. Gated by manga.read.

post.description: Batch-capable chapter delete. Accepts an array of ids of any length (a single-element array is a single delete). Deleted pages' R2 artifacts are cleaned up asynchronously. Unknown ids are ignored.
post.summary: Delete one or more chapters (and their pages) in one call.

get.description: Returns the chapters immediately before and after this one within its media (by chapter number); either side is null at the ends. Public read (metadata only, no page bytes) — matches the chapters-list gate.
Returns short-lived presigned R2 URLs the client fetches directly. Requires a manga.read access token.
get.summary: Page list (presigned URLs) for a chapter

post.summary: Register browser-uploaded AVIF pages as a chapter's page rows.
Create an external-source connection.
Complete the OAuth authorization (code + state exchange).
Begin the OAuth authorization for a connection.
Refresh a connection's OAuth tokens.

get.description:
Queries the connection's external provider (e.g. MyAnimeList) and
returns normalized media suggestions for the create-media autocomplete.
get.summary: Search a connection's provider for media suggestions.

requestBody.description: How many upload URLs to mint

post.summary: Mint a batch of presigned R2 PUT URLs for browser-encoded AVIF pages.

get.description: Legacy proxy kept behind the manga.read gate so the bucket stays private. Prefer the presigned URLs from /v1/chapters/{id}/pages.
get.summary: Proxy an AVIF page object from R2 (retired; gated fallback).

post.summary: Create a registration invite
Create a media entry (manga | video | novel).

get.summary: Chapter list for a media entry

post.summary: Create a chapter under a media entry.

post.description: Provide inline `text` (the server stores it as a .txt in R2) or `textKey` of an already-uploaded object. The chapter then serves as a single novel page whose `body` carries the text.
post.summary: Register a text chapter (stored as .txt in R2) as a chapter's novel page.

post.description: Public self-service signup. The invite code is optional: with a valid single-use code the account is created verified (email_verified=true) and can sign in immediately; without a code it is created unverified and cannot log in until an admin verifies it. A supplied-but-invalid code is rejected.
post.summary: Register a new account (invite optional)

get.description: Sources the reader can browse. Gated by manga.read.

parameters.description: Filter by sub-type slug (repeatable): e.g. manga|manhwa|manhua
parameters.name: subType

parameters.description: Filter by sub-type slug (repeatable): e.g. manga|manhwa|manhua
parameters.name: subType

get.description: Ranks a source's catalog by shared sub-type with the supplied subTypes (aggregated client-side from recent reading; history stays on the client), tie-broken by the popular order. Media whose sub-type is not requested, and any id in exclude, are omitted. With no subTypes it falls back to the source's popular feed.

parameters.description: Comma-separated media ids to omit (already-read / seed)
parameters.name: exclude

parameters.description: Filter by sub-type slug (repeatable): e.g. manga|manhwa|manhua
parameters.name: subType

get.summary: Filterable sub-types present in a source

get.description: Path-based so a playlist's relative segment URIs resolve. Supports HTTP Range for segment seeking.
get.summary: Proxy an HLS playlist/segment object from R2 (used when no public R2 domain).

get.description: Returns the managed set of sub-types allowed per media type (manga|novel|video) — the source of truth for populating a sub-type selector. Backed by the `sub_type` table.
get.summary: Sub-type vocabulary grouped by media type
List all tags of a taxonomy.

post.summary: Create a taxonomy tag.

delete.summary: Delete a taxonomy tag (and its media links).

post.summary: Create an admin user
Register an uploaded HLS playlist as a chapter's video page.

post.description: Preferred over /v1/video/upload: the browser PUTs each bundle file straight to R2 (no container hop), then registers the returned playlistKey via POST /v1/video. Send every file's name (and optional contentType); keys keep the basenames under one prefix so relative segment URIs resolve.
post.summary: Mint presigned R2 PUT URLs for an HLS bundle (direct browser→R2 upload).

post.description: Store an already-segmented HLS bundle. Send the playlist and every segment as repeated "files" parts. Returns the written keys and the detected playlist key to pass to POST /v1/video.

requestBody.description: Target R2 key prefix (defaults to hls/{uuid}/)

post.summary: Upload an HLS bundle (m3u8 + segments) into R2 (multipart field "files").
